name: Todo List
description: Keep track of todos, current tasks, and completed items in one place.
systemPrompt: When the user wants to add, view, start, complete, or delete personal tasks, use the Todo List tools. Tasks are shared globally across conversations and Spaces, and completed items remain archived.
prompt.view: Show all my tasks, including in-progress, todo, and completed archives
prompt.automation: Set up an automated reminder based on my todo list
tool.add.title: Add todo
tool.add.description: Add one item to the user's personal task list with todo status. Use when the user asks to remember, add, or create a task.
tool.add.input.title: The concise task title
tool.list.title: List tasks
tool.list.description: List the user's personal tasks. Return todo and in-progress items by default; include completed archives when the user asks to view everything.
tool.start.title: Start todo
tool.start.description: Move a todo item into progress. The query may be a task ID or an exact or unique partial title.
tool.start.input.query: Task ID or title to move into progress
tool.complete.title: Complete todo
tool.complete.description: Mark an incomplete item as completed and archive it. The query may be a task ID or an exact or unique partial title.
tool.complete.input.query: Task ID or title to complete
tool.delete.title: Delete todo
tool.delete.description: Permanently delete one task. The query may be a task ID or an exact or unique partial title.
tool.delete.input.query: Task ID or title to delete
result.ambiguous:
Multiple tasks matched “{query}”. Use a more specific title or one of these IDs:
{matches}
